install_cmds: pip install --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu torch || pip install torch
facebookresearch__fvcore.a491d5b9.notes: CPU torch wheel index keeps fallback runtimes within disk/time budgets (PyPI CUDA torch as fallback); tabulate is pinned because 0.10 changes _model_stats_table indentation.

Project-MONAI__MONAI.a09c1f08.notes: requirements-dev.txt pulls torch; preinstall the CPU wheel so pip resolution does not download CUDA builds.

pre_install_pip: meson-python>=0.13.1 meson>=1.2.1 ninja cython>=3.0 numpy versioneer[toml] python-dateutil pytz hypothesis pytest-xdist
pandas-dev__pandas.95280573.notes: Profile builds pandas from source with --no-build-isolation; build requirements normally come from the conda env yml.

dask__dask.5f61e423.notes: Test suite exercises dataframe/array paths whose deps come from the conda env yml, not setup.py.

encode__starlette.db5063c2.notes: Test deps come from requirements.txt in the image build env.

pydantic__pydantic.acb0f10f.notes: Profile uses make install (uv sync into its own venv); fallback installs the package plus the test dependency group directly.

jsvine__pdfplumber.02ff4313.notes: Profile installs ghostscript via apt-get; fallback runtimes may use dnf, so it is declared as a system package instead.

getmoto__moto.694ce1f4.notes: Profile runs make init, which wraps these pip installs; calling pip directly avoids requiring make on the fallback runtime.

iterative__dvc.1d6ea681.notes: dvc/ignore.py imports the private pathspec _DIR_MARK symbol, which moved after 0.10.x.

sunpy__sunpy.f8edfd5c.notes: Compiles C extensions and loads large test fixtures.

conan-io__conan.86f29e13.notes: Conan integration tests shell out to autotools/cmake toolchains; sqlite3 support comes from the uv-managed interpreter.

cantools__cantools.0c6a7871.notes: sqlite3 support comes from the uv-managed interpreter; [dev,plot] extras cover the remaining deps.

python-trio__trio.cfbbe2c1.notes: Test-only deps from trio's test-requirements; pyOpenSSL/cryptography era-pinned because newer majors break the DTLS test context.

stanfordnlp__dspy.651a4c71.notes: Test-only deps from the conda env yml; litellm era-pinned (with proxy extras for the mock LLM server fixture) because newer versions change ModelResponse mocking behavior. The image-handling F2P tests fetch URLs, so they need outbound HTTP.
